texto: Slaves in the past were captured by force
autor: today’s slaves surrender themselves. The masters are the same old folk (who are now more civilized) who would not lift a hand against a fellow human being! They have established economic systems that perpetuate their superiority so the poor are blamed either for their laziness or their fate.
explicacao: Citação de today’s slaves surrender themselves. The masters are the same old folk (who are now more civilized) who would not lift a hand against a fellow human being! They have established economic systems that perpetuate their superiority so the poor are blamed either for their laziness or their fate. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Slaves in the past were captured by force” articula reflexao, bangambiki-habyarimana, book-of-wisdom em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como book-of-wisdom.
